Author: greenteakitkats
Name: Housing History
Punchline: A running log of furniture you place and remove.
Description: A read-only log of furnishings placed, removed, moved, rotated, and dyed in your house — with coordinates, dye names, item icons, and a 'since last visit' diff. Click any coordinate to copy it (handy for undoing a move). Complementary to Burning Down the House. Open with /houselog.
